untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle is a complex visual pattern requiring: (1) identification of cup-shaped price formation with two similar rims (within 6% difference), (2) detection of handle pullback with specific retrace percentages (42%, 35%, 60%), and (3) validation that price closes below right rim before breakout. These multi-bar pattern matching requirements cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators (close, high, low, open, volume, moving averages, RSI, ATR, etc.). The pattern requires historical sequence analysis and geometric shape recognition beyond the scope of simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: The signal describes a candlestick pattern recognition strategy that fundamentally requires pattern detection logic not available in standard indicator-based rule definitions. A proper implementation would need custom pattern-matching functions or machine learning-based shape recognition. The entry/exit conditions provided are placeholder approximations only and do not capture the true Cup and Handle logic.
